---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new platform, tool, or improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like added?

A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Use case

Why is this useful? Who benefits from it?

## Platform / tool details (if applicable)

- Platform: [e.g. Alpine Linux, NixOS]
- Tool: [e.g. Bun, Deno, .NET SDK]
- Package manager used: [e.g. apk, nix, winget]

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried working around this? What didn't work?

## Are you willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can write the script and open a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] No, just suggesting
